entity.summary: Somnia-native self-custody trading platform combining best-price spot aggregation, V2 and concentrated-liquidity AMMs, perpetual markets, single-sided perp liquidity pools, and meme-token launch and trading interfaces.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation treats SpotX aggregation, Somnex V2 and V3 liquidity, perpetual trading, and meme launch as products of one Somnex trading-platform identity. Current independent metrics report non-zero spot volume, fees, liquidity, and historical perpetual activity. No exact launch date, legal entity, or jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: Somnex protocol introduction
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies Somnex as a Somnia-native trading platform and documents the current swap aggregator, V2 and V3 liquidity, perpetual markets, meme launch, and wallet-connected application flow.

evidence.title: Somnex protocol metrics
evidence.notes: Current independent metrics report non-zero Somnia spot volume, fees, and liquidity for the combined Somnex trading platform.
